message:
test(ftui-extras): improve mermaid_minimap.rs test coverage (bd-1op9l)

Add 39 edge case tests covering fit_aspect_ratio boundaries, layout_to_px
coordinate mapping, recolor_cell bounds, viewport indicator extremes,
single/multi-waypoint edges, tiny node rendering, border verification,
background fill, and custom config colors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
